revision.comment: Add optional parameters for subcategory links. Tested with [[/sandbox]] and [[/testcases]].
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Cmbox | type=notice | text=This is a '''[[Wikipedia:Categorization#Non-diffusing_subcategories|non-diffusing subcategory]]''' of [[:Category:#if:1|{{{1}}}}}]].
It includes {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{1}}}}} that can also be found in the parent category, or in diffusing subcategories {{#if:{{{3|}}}{{{4|}}}{{{5|}}}{{{6|}}}|such as {{Pagelist|nspace=Category|conjunction= or |{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}}|{{{6|}}}}}|of the parent}}. }}{{Single namespace|Category|[[Category:Wikipedia non-diffusing subcategories]]}} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Cmbox | type=notice | text=This is a '''[[Wikipedia:Categorization#Non-diffusing_subcategories|non-diffusing subcategory]]''' of [[:Category:#if:1|{{{1}}}}}]].
It includes {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{1}}}}} that can also be found in the parent category, or in diffusing subcategories {{#if:{{{3|}}}{{{4|}}}{{{5|}}}{{{6|}}}|such as {{Pagelist|nspace=Category|conjunction= or |{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}}|{{{6|}}}}}|of the parent}}. }}{{Single namespace|Category|[[Category:Wikipedia non-diffusing subcategories]]}} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{Cmbox | type=notice | text=This is a '''[[Wikipedia:Categorization#Non-diffusing_subcategories|non-diffusing subcategory]]''' of [[:Category:#if:1|{{{1}}}}}]].
It includes {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{1}}}}} that can also be found in the parent category, or in diffusing subcategories {{#if:{{{3|}}}{{{4|}}}{{{5|}}}{{{6|}}}|such as {{Pagelist|nspace=Category|conjunction= or |{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}}|{{{6|}}}}}|of the parent}}. }}{{Single namespace|Category|[[Category:Wikipedia non-diffusing subcategories]]}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23518067722|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Cmbox | type=notice | text=This is a '''[[Wikipedia:Categorization#Non-diffusing_subcategories|non-diffusing subcategory]]''' of [[:Category:#if:1|{{{1}}}}}]].
It includes {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{1}}}}} that can also be found in the parent category, or in diffusing subcategories {{#if:{{{3|}}}{{{4|}}}{{{5|}}}{{{6|}}}|such as {{Pagelist|nspace=Category|conjunction= or |{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}}|{{{6|}}}}}|of the parent}}. }}{{Single namespace|Category|}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Wikipedia non-diffusing subcategories]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Cmbox | type=notice | text=This is a '''[[Wikipedia:Categorization#Non-diffusing_subcategories|non-diffusing subcategory]]''' of [[:Category:#if:1|{{{1}}}}}]].
It includes {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{1}}}}} that can also be found in the parent category, or in diffusing subcategories {{#if:{{{3|}}}{{{4|}}}{{{5|}}}{{{6|}}}|such as {{Pagelist|nspace=Category|conjunction= or |{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}}|{{{6|}}}}}|of the parent}}. }}{{Single namespace|Category|}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Wikipedia non-diffusing subcategories]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
